source_pr.title: Maxiaoyu/ordered merge join
source_pr.body:
Add order keeping logic so that multi-way merge join without sort is enabled.
Without a secondary sort operator, it only consider cases that required single key for now.

symptoms: result := checkPlanAndRun(tk, c, plan1, "select /*+ TIDB_SMJ(t1,t2,t3) */ * from t1 join t2 on t1.c1 = t2.c1 join t3 on t2.c1 = t3.c1 order by 1") (executor/merge_join_test.go)
failure_signature: result := checkPlanAndRun(tk, c, plan1, "select /*+ TIDB_SMJ(t1,t2,t3) */ * from t1 join t2 on t1.c1 = t2.c1 join t3 on t2.c1 = t3.c1 order by 1") (executor/merge_join_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: result := checkPlanAndRun(tk, c, plan1, "select /*+ TIDB_SMJ(t1,t2,t3) */ * from t1 join t2 on t1.c1 = t2.c1 join t3 on t2.c1 = t3.c1 order by 1") (executor/merge_join_test.go)
